task: Lysander wrote a long letter to Demetrius. He poured out feelings he had kept hidden for years.
The harp stood gracefully in the parlour. It had once belonged to a celebrated nineteenth-century musician.
Penelope confided in Aurora about the betrayal. She listened with quiet sympathy and gentle understanding.
The seagull dove toward the foamy waves. It snatched a small silver fish in its sharp beak.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the foamy waves".

task: Algernon argued with Percival about the inheritance. He insisted his father had clearly intended otherwise.
The compass pointed steadily toward the north. It had guided the explorer through many treacherous storms.
Beatrice recommended Octavia for the role. She had years of relevant theatrical experience already.
The drum sat unused in the attic. It had been forgotten there for nearly thirty quiet years.
Frederick asked Henrik for the loan. He had recently faced unexpected medical expenses for his family.
